title: chloris pectinata var. typica
intro: Chloris pectinata var. typica, also known as feather finger grass or feather grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating respiratory problems. Chloris pectinata var. typica can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use.
